safest_plan.entry_basis: moneytaur — deep weekly demand floor ~$125–140 (bottom of the green demand box on the chart); he explicitly says wait for this deep zone, don't chase

targets.basis: moneytaur — supply (red horizontal line ~$425 on chart)

safest_plan.stop_basis: below the weekly HTF demand floor ~$125 (thick green support band at the base of the chart); losing it breaks the accumulation thesis

stance_by_source.summary: Patient long-term buyer: accumulate spot in the deep weekly demand zone ($130–290, ideally the $125–140 floor) and wait — don't chase — for a rebound toward $320–420.

conflicts: The chart shows a second, higher supply band around $520 (grey zone) that the extracted text omitted — a level to watch if price ever clears the ~$420 supply.
Live price ($191.55) is already inside the broad demand box ($130–290), but the source's stated plan is to wait for the deeper $125–140 floor — so 'in the zone' does not mean 'time to buy' here.
plain_english: Only one source covers Bitcoin Cash, and the view is patient and bullish for the long haul: treat the big buy zone roughly between $130 and $290 as a place to slowly accumulate, ideally near the $125–140 floor, and aim for a recovery toward $320, $355, then $420. The current price near $191 is inside that zone but above the deepest, best-value buying area, and the source's own note is 'eventually — don't chase.' The plan only breaks if price loses about $125. Action: wait — don't buy here; set alerts for the deeper $125–140 area and let price come to you.
